welcome:
👋 Hi! I'm Bastion, your personal Life OS.

I'll guide you through a quick setup so I can help you in the best possible way.
ask_occupation:
What do you do? Tell me your main job or occupation.
(e.g. "Software developer", "Entrepreneur", "UX Designer", "Medical student")
ask_business:
Do you have your own business or venture beyond your main job?
(Answer "yes" or "no", or describe it briefly if you'd like)
ask_bio:
Tell me a bit about yourself — who you are, your background, anything you think is relevant.

This helps me understand you better and personalize my responses.
ask_pain_points:
What are your biggest challenges, pain points, and goals right now?

Feel free to be specific — the more context you give me, the better I can help.
ask_life_areas:
Which areas of your life do you want me to help manage?

Examples:
• Work / Career
• Business / Entrepreneurship
• Health & Wellness
• Family
• Personal Finances
• Study / Learning
• Personal Projects
• Relationships

List the areas that make sense for you, one per line or separated by commas.
confirm_areas: Got it! I'll create personas for these areas:
confirm_prompt: Is that correct? (yes/no — or tell me what to adjust)
persona_detail_prompt: Let me learn more about your
ask_what_to_do: What do you want me to do and focus on in this area?
ask_current_state: What's your current situation in this area? (be honest — this helps me track your progress)
ask_specific_goals: What are your specific, measurable goals for this area?
skill_install_prompt: Would you like to install them? (yes / no / choose)
weights_summary: I've set the initial weights for your personas based on the order you provided:
weights_explanation:
Weights determine which persona takes priority when you send me a message.
You can adjust them now or at any time with the /personas command.
weights_adjust_prompt: Would you like to adjust any weight? (yes/no)
totp_intro:
🔐 Now let's set up your two-factor authentication.

This ensures only you can use Bastion, even if someone has access to your Telegram/WhatsApp.

You'll need the Authy app (or Google Authenticator) on your phone.

Ready to continue? (yes/no)
ask_identity_name:
Almost done! One last thing: what should I be called?

(e.g. "Bastion", "Assistant", your own name for me — whatever feels natural to you)
ask_identity_behavior:
And how should I behave in default mode, when no persona is active?

(e.g. "Direct and concise", "Friendly and detailed", "Formal and professional")
completion_instructions:
From now on, I'll respond according to the context of each area of your life.

Some useful commands:
• /personas — view and edit your personas
• /weights — adjust priority weights
• /crisis — activate crisis mode for urgent replanning
• /connect-app — connect the mobile app
• /help — see all available commands

How can I help you today?
